sharedStateObservations.description: Worker prompts resolve runtime skill files from .maestro/skills/{skillName}/SKILL.md first, then fall back to skills/built-in/{skillName}/SKILL.md
Prompt content sanitization uses markdown code fences to isolate user content from prompt structure
Generated prompts are written to workers/{featureId}/prompt.md with optional --out override
Runtime skill files follow the SKILL.md naming convention under .maestro/skills/{skillName}/, with shipped fallbacks under skills/built-in/{skillName}/

notes: Feature prompt command generates complete worker assignments
Prompts include mission context, milestone context, verification details, and skill instructions
JSON flag resolution works at root, group, and leaf levels
Content sanitization prevents markdown injection issues
Dependencies section included when feature has dependencies
